styleGuide.description: PayeTax blog images in the Ledger direction

background.texture: subtle paper grain, faint ledger grid, or ruled document lines

styleGuide.illustrationStyle: flat or lightly dimensional editorial still life, not glossy fintech illustration
styleGuide.lighting: clean daylight, low contrast, no glow
avoid: text, titles, labels, logos, or fake HMRC branding
styleGuide.notes: The website supplies article titles and metadata. Images should support the subject without making unverifiable claims.

promptPatterns.salaryGuides: Editorial still life of a payslip, calculator tape, and neatly separated pound notes on warm paper. Faint ledger grid in the background. Ink-blue and muted-gold accents. No text.
promptPatterns.taxBasics: Clean tax explainer scene using forms, ruled paper, and a simple calculator. Public-authority tone, restrained ink-blue accents, flat document-led composition. No text.
promptPatterns.taxPlanning: Pension and tax-planning scene with annotated paper sheets, envelopes, and a calculator. Muted green and ink-blue accents. No text or labels.
promptPatterns.directorGuides: Limited-company director tax scene with ledger pages, dividend notes, company accounts, and a calculator. Broadsheet editorial tone, warm paper, ink-blue accents. No text.
promptPatterns.studentLoans: Student loan repayment scene with payslip, calculator, and stacked documents. Calm explanatory tone, paper background, ink-blue and muted-green accents. No text.
promptPatterns.taxChanges: Budget or tax-change scene with official-looking papers, a calendar, and a calculator. Muted red or gold accents for attention. No text or branding.
promptPatterns.deadlines: Tax deadline scene with calendar, forms, and envelope on a desk. Muted-gold attention accent, clean paper-led layout. No text.

filenameRules.shape: short descriptive kebab-case matching the post topic
